best_individual: mul(if_then_else(or_(is_water, is_water), if_then_else(is_water, 0.007, distance), 0.007), add(distance, if_then_else(is_water, 0.209, steepness)))

hall_of_fame.individual: mul(if_then_else(or_(is_water, is_water), if_then_else(is_water, 0.007, distance), 0.007), add(distance, if_then_else(is_water, 0.209, steepness)))
mul(if_then_else(and_(is_water, is_water), distance, if_then_else(is_water, 0.114, 0.009)), add(distance, steepness))
mul(if_then_else(is_water, if_then_else(is_water, distance, distance), 0.007), add(distance, if_then_else(is_water, distance, steepness)))
